message:
feat: add indexed aggregates and filtered WASM aggregate path

- Add sumFloat64Indexed, minFloat64Indexed, maxFloat64Indexed (and int64 variants) to Zig engine
- Extend WasmAggregateOperator to handle filtered aggregates: SIMD filter → indexed aggregate, bypassing Row[] materialization
- Fix int64 filter bug: restrict WASM filter path to f64/i32 (no filterInt64Buffer exists)
- Upgrade unionIndices to O(n+m) sorted merge
